calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-28-2011 Off Calendar

Default Prove Up Hearing
Off Calendar Sep-29-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge: Ellen Chaitin, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Fields, #7235.

Deidre Von Rock-Ricci, Esq. for Plaintiff Anderson & Poole, P.C.
Plaintiff's Witness Ellis Ross Anderson was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant Shane Industries, Inc. and Mark Grim as follows:

Damages/Principal - $92,904.84
Pre-judgment Interest - $21,458.03 and 08-01-09 thru 09-29-11 Interest $929.40
Costs - $514.00, for a total judgment in the amount of $115,806.27

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
